query:
-- Yiros Albion: update service 299 with AVC and address
UPDATE services SET
  connectionId = 'AVC000114712291',
  phoneNumber = '07 3262 5890',
  locationAddress = 'BG 1, G, SHOP 6, 6 CROSBY RD, ALBION, QLD, 4010',
  planName = 'Telstra Upfront Internet Plan Basic',
  monthlyCost = '93.00',
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), '\n[Telstra Invoice TTI20189793254 Mar-Apr 2026] Yiros Albion. AVC: AVC000114712291. Phone: 07 3262 5890. Plan: Telstra Upfront Internet Plan Basic. Cost: $93.00.')
WHERE id = 299;

-- Maitland stub with externalId
INSERT INTO services (
  externalId, serviceId, serviceType, serviceTypeDetail, planName, status,
  locationAddress, connectionId, phoneNumber, customerExternalId, customerName,
  monthlyCost, supplierName, supplierAccount, discoveryNotes
) VALUES (
  'AVC000231649853', 'AVC000231649853', 'Internet', 'NBN', 'Telstra Upfront Business Internet Plan Premium', 'active',
  'HUNTER MALL, BG 1, G, OFF 1, 405 HIGH ST, MAITLAND, NSW, 2320',
  'AVC000231649853', '02 4936 6007', 'C1412', 'The Yiros Marketplace',
  '125.00', 'Telstra', 'Telstra',
  '[Telstra Invoice TTI20189793254 Mar-Apr 2026] Yiros Maitland. Plan: Telstra Upfront Business Internet Plan Premium. Cost: $125.00. NOTE: Confirm customer assignment with Alfredo - may be a different entity.'
);
